app_info.subtitle: Manage your PaPut knowledge
app_info.description: PaPut helps users search, create, and organize their memos and notes, maintain goals and a skill sheet that can include personal profile fields, and review reusable knowledge through ChatGPT. OAuth limits access to the user's PaPut account, and publish-capable tools act only on explicit public visibility or profile updates.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates one or more PaPut memo records and therefore changes the user's data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Each new memo can be published publicly when the user selects public visibility.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates new memos without deleting or overwriting existing records.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves memos matching the supplied filters without modifying PaPut data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads the user's PaPut data and does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or otherwise alter any record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Runs a semantic lookup and returns similar memos without changing stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only searches the user's PaPut memos and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, replace, or mutate any memo.

justifications.read_only_justification: Generates and stores missing embedding metadata for up to 100 existing memos.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only internal PaPut search metadata and does not publish or contact third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds missing embeddings without deleting or overwriting the user's memo content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the selected memo and its metadata without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads a PaPut record and does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or alter the selected memo.

justifications.read_only_justification: Replaces fields on an existing PaPut memo, including its content, categories, links, and visibility.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish a memo publicly or remove an existing public memo from public view.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the selected memo's existing fields with the provided final state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists available PaPut categories without creating or updating them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only retrieves private account data and does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove, replace, or modify categories.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a new PaPut note that groups the supplied memo IDs.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish the newly created note publicly when public visibility is selected.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new note without deleting or overwriting existing notes.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves notes matching keyword, visibility, and pagination filters without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only searches the user's PaPut notes and does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or mutate any note.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a note and its attached memos without modifying PaPut data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads an existing PaPut note and does not change external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove, replace, or alter the note or its memos.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes an existing note's title, visibility, or attached memo list.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish the note publicly or remove it from public view by changing visibility.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the supplied fields and can replace the note's attached memo list.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the user's skill sheet profile, skills, FAQ, and projects without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads the user's PaPut skill sheet and does not change public state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, replace, or alter skill sheet content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates basic profile fields such as nearest station, gender, birth date, and experience.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes profile information that may be displayed on the user's public skill sheet.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the supplied profile fields on the existing skill sheet.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the self PR text stored on the user's PaPut skill sheet.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes self PR content that may be visible on the user's public skill sheet.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the existing self PR section with the supplied text.

justifications.read_only_justification: Replaces the user's complete skill list with the supplied final state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes skills that may be displayed on the user's public skill sheet.
justifications.destructive_justification: Full-replaces the existing skill list, removing entries omitted from the new state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a skill sheet project or updates an existing ID or exact title match.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can create or change a non-private project displayed on the user's public profile.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can overwrite an existing matched project's details, links, and achievements.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes the selected project from the user's PaPut skill sheet.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can remove a project that is currently displayed on the user's public profile.
justifications.destructive_justification: Permanently deletes the selected skill sheet project by ID.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves project information, public linked memo bodies, and a private memo count for drafting.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads existing PaPut content and does not publish or modify it.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or change project or memo data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores a replacement set of design-and-judgment episodes for a skill sheet project.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes project episodes that may be displayed on the user's public profile.
justifications.destructive_justification: Full-replaces all existing episodes and can clear them with an empty list.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores a replacement FAQ section on the user's PaPut skill sheet.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes FAQ content that may be displayed on the user's public skill sheet.
justifications.destructive_justification: Full-replaces all FAQ items and can clear the section with an empty list.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists the user's active and archived PaPut goals without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private goal data and does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or alter any goal.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a new goal in the user's PaPut account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates only a private PaPut goal and does not publish or contact third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds a new goal without deleting or overwriting existing goals.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the selected goal's content, category, status, priority, or target date.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private PaPut goal data and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the existing goal fields with the supplied state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Deletes a goal from the user's PaPut account by ID.
justifications.open_world_justification: Removes only private PaPut goal data and does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Permanently deletes the selected goal.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the saved dashboard analysis without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private PaPut analysis data and does not affect external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, replace, or alter the saved analysis.

justifications.read_only_justification: Saves a dashboard analysis generated by the client model to PaPut.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only the user's private PaPut analysis and does not publish it externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the previously saved dashboard analysis with the supplied result.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves dashboard, goal, skill sheet, memo, note, and category context without changing it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads the user's PaPut data and does not publish or transmit changes to third parties.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, replace, or mutate any source data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves private project instructions, proposal summaries, and document counts without modifying them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private project-scoped PaPut data and does not change external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or alter project context.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a private project document by ID without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private project documentation and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, replace, or alter the project document.

justifications.read_only_justification: Runs semantic search over private project documents without changing stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only searches private PaPut project records and does not affect external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, archive, or otherwise modify documents.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private project document and may create a private skill proposal after deduplication.
justifications.open_world_justification: Stores documents only in private project context and never exposes them publicly.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds a new document without deleting or overwriting existing documents.

justifications.read_only_justification: Replaces fields and optionally changes the status of an existing private project document.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private project documentation and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Full-replaces the title, summary, and body and can archive the document.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the always-applied instructions for a private PaPut project.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private project configuration and does not publish to external systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the complete existing instruction text after explicit user approval.

justifications.read_only_justification: Records a proposal rejection and changes whether the private proposal is raised again.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private project proposal state and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Discards the proposal from the active flow and records the rejection reason.

justifications.read_only_justification: Marks a private skill proposal and related procedures as promoted after a skill is created.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private PaPut project-document status and does not publish the skill itself.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retires the promoted documents from the active index and records the promotion target.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates reusable knowledge candidates in the user's private pending queue.
justifications.open_world_justification: Stores candidates privately and does not publish them as memos or to third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Adds pending candidates without deleting or overwriting existing saved knowledge.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists session markers already recorded for knowledge capture without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private processing metadata and does not affect external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not remove, replace, or alter processed-session markers.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a processed-session marker that changes future knowledge-capture behavior.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private PaPut processing metadata and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Marks the session as processed with no exposed operation for undoing that marker.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists private pending knowledge candidates without changing their contents or status.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads the user's private pending queue and does not change external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not save, discard, overwrite, or delete any candidate.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes supplied fields on an existing candidate in the private pending queue.
justifications.open_world_justification: Updates only private pending data and does not publish the candidate as a memo.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the supplied candidate fields before the candidate is saved.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a PaPut memo from an approved candidate and marks that candidate as saved.
justifications.open_world_justification: Can publish the created memo publicly when public visibility is selected or stored on the candidate.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a memo and advances candidate status without deleting or overwriting an existing memo.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes a pending candidate to discarded status and records an optional reason.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only the user's private candidate workflow and does not affect public systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Removes the candidate from the save flow, preventing it from being saved while discarded.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves the saved private capture policy without modifying it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private PaPut policy data and does not affect external state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or alter the capture policy.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves discarded candidates and the current capture policy for analysis without changing them.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads private PaPut workflow data and does not affect public or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, restore, overwrite, or otherwise modify candidates or policy.

justifications.read_only_justification: Saves a new client-generated capture policy in the user's PaPut account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes only private capture-policy data and does not publish it externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the previously saved capture policy with the supplied Markdown.

test_cases.description: Find semantically related memos even when the wording differs.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use PaPut to find memos related to choosing an OAuth design, even if they do not contain the exact word OAuth.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns relevant PaPut memos with similarity information and enough detail to review the matches.

test_cases.description: Create multiple private memos from explicit user-provided content.
test_cases.user_prompt: Save these as two private PaPut memos: one about the deployment decision and one about the rollback procedure.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates two private memos and returns their created IDs without publishing them.

test_cases.description: Organize existing memos into a public note after explicit publication intent.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a public PaPut note named OAuth implementation notes using memo IDs 101 and 102.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates the public note with the specified title and attached memo IDs and returns its ID.

test_cases.description: Replace an approved skill sheet self PR.
test_cases.user_prompt: I approve replacing my PaPut skill sheet self PR with: I turn ambiguous requirements into testable product decisions.
test_cases.expected_output: Updates the self PR with the approved text and confirms the saved profile change.

test_cases.description: List pending reusable knowledge for review without saving it.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my pending PaPut knowledge candidates so I can decide which ones to save.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the pending candidates with enough detail for the user to review them without changing their status.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because PaPut does not provide calendar access.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general web research.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Search the web for today's artificial intelligence news.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because PaPut does not browse the web or provide news search.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for direct access to local AI session files.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Open my local Codex session files and summarize yesterday's conversations.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the MCP server cannot read local session files.
